questions: What is the cause of the obstructive jaundice (e.g., choledocholithiasis, periampullary mass)?
If the cause is choledocholithiasis, are the stones amenable to ERCP retrieval? (Yes/No)
If the cause is a periampullary mass, is it resectable? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have any known hypersensitivity to cephalosporins? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have fluid overload or hypervolemia? (Yes/No)
